title: Monday.com expert needed to help us shine!
excerpt: Our small but mighty marketing team is looking for a Monday.com guru that can help us make the most out of Monday. We’ve been using it for awhile, but haven’t had the bandwidth to create the boards, workflows, and automa…

posts.author: MelissaAZ (Melissa Weinberger)
posts.cookedHtml: Our small but mighty marketing team is looking for a Monday.com guru that can help us make the most out of Monday. We’ve been using it for awhile, but haven’t had the bandwidth to create the boards, workflows, and automation that will really make it sing. You’re our only hope!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MelissaAZ - welcome to the community! You have certainly come to the right place as there are numerous monday experts that can give you a hand.

A little about us, we are a certified monday.com implementation partner and have been helping customers in a variety of industries get up and running and also optimize their current solutions. Everything we do is monday! We are also certified in external integration programs such as make.com to get the most out of your monday solution but also integrate seamlessly with all your other apps. Each of our Llamas are skilled in Development, Analysis, Project Management and Training.

We like to start with a complementary discovery session to go through your requirements, but also to ensure we are the best possible fit. If you would like to continue you can book your preferred time here: Book A Discovery Session - Green Llamas Consulting. If you can’t find a time that works for you feel free to let us know and we will do our very best to accommodate you personally.

Thanks @MelissaAZ
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: MondayMex (Gabriel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello

We can definitely take on the project you are describing. We have worked with dozens of Monday customers with similar projects.

We are a Monday gold partner based in Mexico City and we believe our experience combined with our attractive cost structure can make a winning combination.

Please reach out at info@cinapsys.com we will be super happy to be of help.

Margaritas are not included…

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MelissaAZ ,

I am a certified monday.com consultant and would love to connect to understand your use case in a better way and suggest you the best possible solution.

You can reach out to me at aquibcs@outlook.com

Best Regards,
Aquib Zafar

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MelissaAZ

Welcome to the community! We would love to help your mighty team. Marketing and Digital Marketing teams are our niche!

We are monday channel partner from Australia called Kick Consulting. We offer a complimentary 60-minute discovery call where we get to know your needs and see if we can help you. You can book it here.

Elena,
CEO and Founder
Kick Consulting

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @MelissaAZ ,

Welcome to the monday community !

I am sure our team at thespelas.com can help you out! At thespelas.com we’re an Official and Authorized monday partner with over 5 years of individual experience on the platform and extensive experience in designing and implementing customized solutions that are tailored to each business’ goals.

We have a wealth of experience in creating specialized solutions that are according to business and monday best practices, and our team of experts can really take your processes to the next level!

Complex to implement yet easy to follow workflows, seamlessly connected boards , time-saving automations and even integrations with any other software you might use, you name it and we can do it!

Please do schedule a Free Consulting Session with us here so we can better discuss your vision and requirements! Alternatively, if none of the available time slots work out for you, please contact us at info@thespelas.com so we can do our best to accommodate you.

I sincerely hope our services can be of use to you!

Best Regards,
Giannis Koukounas, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: MelissaAZ (Melissa Weinberger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Giannis ,

I would be interested in chatting, but it looks like we’re in opposite time zones. I would need to meet sometime between 9am-4pm PST.

Thanks,
Melissa

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MelissaAZ

At upstream , we are proud to offer our expertise as Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners, and we were most recently awarded Professional Services Partner of the Year!

Our company is based in Australia, and we have a dedicated and experienced global staff network that can meet your needs. Our Solutions Engineers and full stack Development Team specialise in integrations and custom requirements, and we are confident in our ability to provide valuable support to your organisation.

To schedule a meeting, you can reach me directly at peta@upstreamtech.io or book a meeting with us through the link provided below. We look forward to discussing your objectives and finding ways to help you achieve your goals.

Chat with Peta
International Client - Special Hours

Thank you for considering upstream as your partner, and have a great day ahead!

Kind regards,
Peta

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Glad to hear that @MelissaAZ !

We do have many a client in that time zone, and it is no problem meeting during your preferred hours ( usually on the earlier end). The Calendly link I attached ( this one) should have meetings during your time frame, though not everyday because of other meetings and obligations.

You can also contact our CEO directly at thanos@thespelas.com if you would like to meet at a later hour not available on the Calendly program.

We would be very happy to hear back from you!

Best,
Giannis Koukounas, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @MelissaAZ

Welcome to the monday community !

We are really glad that you chose monday.com to manage your marketing activities. Monday.com is a marketing powerhouse tool with integration capabilities extended across various productivity tools and features.

We at Damco helped multiple clients in building effective, high productivity boards, workflows and custom automations to minimize the manual efforts and make most out of the monday.com.

If you’re looking for a professional assistance [hiring monday.com consultants ] from a preferred partner company is the right choice. The consultants can potentially build custom workflows and automations in a way to help you visualize and setup your project boards.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
Phone: +1 609 632 0350 | Email : info@damcogroup.com

posts.author: MelissaAZ (Melissa Weinberger)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello all! Just wanted to send an update. We’ve spoken with several experts and found a solution that fits our need. Thank you to everyone that responded, we really appreciate it! Cheers - Melissa
